---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for Soulboard
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: [enhancement]
assignees: []
---

## Problem Statement
What problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Solution
Describe the change you would like to see.

## Alternatives Considered
Describe any alternative solutions or approaches you have considered.

## Use Cases
Who benefits from this and how?

## Acceptance Criteria
List concrete conditions for this request to be considered done.

## Additional Context
Add mockups, references, links, or other context here.

## Checklist
- [ ] I searched existing issues before opening this request.
- [ ] This request describes a clear user or developer need.
- [ ] I added enough detail for maintainers to evaluate feasibility.
